description: Evidence-linked assurance case for AERS. Each material trust claim maps to implementation, tests, and adversarial benchmark cases. Digests are refreshed with `assure assurance --refresh` after an intentional change.

claims.text: Repository-local code cannot issue a production-valid VERIFIED result.
claims.residual_limitations: A compromised external verifier key is outside this repository's control.

claims.text: Attestations bind candidate, policy, and evidence digests; tamper, substitution, and replay are detected.
claims.residual_limitations: Freshness relies on the relying party's trusted clock.

claims.text: Task writes are constrained to the approved write scope.
claims.residual_limitations: In-scope-but-incorrect changes still require reviewer judgment.

claims.text: Control-plane paths are protected from candidate writes and deletions.
claims.residual_limitations: Authorized human control-plane changes still require the dogfooding review workflow.

claims.text: New regression tests must discriminate against the base revision.
claims.residual_limitations: A discriminating test can still be incomplete; coverage is not correctness.

claims.text: Memory cannot promote itself; promotion requires a separate curator and multiple runs.
claims.residual_limitations: A compromised curator identity is out of scope for the author tier.

claims.text: A task cannot modify a guardrail and rely on the modified guardrail in the same run.
claims.residual_limitations: Policies are read at the immutable contract ref, not the working tree.

claims.text: Asserted isolation is not accepted as proven; R2 and above fail closed without stronger evidence.
claims.residual_limitations: A host with no isolation mechanism cannot be upgraded to PROVEN locally.

claims.text: R2 review requires independent, candidate-bound evidence.
claims.residual_limitations: Two correlated reviewers can share a blind spot; evaluator-health monitors this.

claims.text: A credential in a candidate diff is blocked by a hard deterministic gate.
claims.residual_limitations: Novel secret formats outside the format-anchored patterns need reviewer attention.

claims.text: The evaluator that judges candidates is itself tested for seeded-defect detection and reproducibility.
claims.residual_limitations: The health suite tests the deterministic audit; model-reviewer health needs live-model runs.
